structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-07-16 Updated Product Resources
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-07-16 09:25:43-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

The Product Department has updated resources that are available on NOVANet in response to valuable feedback from our team members.  The Investor Guide has been thoroughly updated with the latest guidelines and investor information. We've also enhanced its structure to make it more navigable and user-friendly.  Additionally, a new Broker Overview document has been added.  This document breaks down which brokers offer which products, and provides AE contact information as well.  These enhancements aim to streamline access to useful information and support our loan officers more effectively.  We encourage everyone to explore these updated resources on NOVANet!  

 

ATTACHMENTS

*	INVESTOR GUIDE 7.15.25.pdf <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:b:/s/Home/EblEjNY5YGBPpabOwNY4kS8BZTBURiRrvHifwrJr8j-cEQ?e=kWDyQo> 
*	 Broker Overview 7.11.25.pdf <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:b:/s/Home/EfYpv97TXwdKvkuaALz7oBQBjoz85_Xs6L-CbOydY1IpbQ?e=Db1Geo> 

 

IMPORTANT NOTE

The documents are attached here for your convenience, but please keep in mind these are liquid documents that will be updated as necessary.  Be mindful of this and know that you will need to pull these from NOVANet in the future in order to have up-to-date information.

 

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

To find additional information, follow this path: NOVANet > Products & Underwriting > NOVA Products & Underwriting 2025 <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:f:/s/Home/Ema2vZmJxnVLhH7BW8DrwrQBpqUxeTeHF_LrVlESIipknA?e=BAKdHP>
